title: Yankee Candle Car Jar Scented Air Freshener | Clean Cotton | 3 Count
features: Sun-dried cotton combined with green notes, white flowers and a hint of lemon
Freshen up your commute with your favourite Yankee Candle scent
Fragrance-infused paperboard provides up to a month of long-lasting fragrance
Makes a great affordable gift for any occasion or 'just because'
Also ideal in small spaces like pet areas or gym lockers
description: From the manufacturer Car Air Freshner Fragrance-infused paperboard provides up to a month of long-lasting fragrance. Car Jar Ultimate Odour-neutralising fragrance insert shrinks below label to let you know when it's time to replace. Car Vent Sticks Each resealable package comes with 4 air freshener vent sticks that can be used together or separately. Smart Scent Vent Clips Fastens onto your car's dashboard vent and features a slider bar that lets you adjust fragrance strength. Charming Scents Starter Kit Available in 3 design options (linear, square & geometric), each starter kit comes with a bangle, logo charm and fragrance-filled locket. Charming Scents Refill Easily change or refill your Charming Scents fragrance locket with true-to-life scents that last up to 4 weeks.
